info.title: Acme Bank BFA Gateway API
info.description:
Single-ingress gateway for CES-facing tool invocation.

This export is the canonical module contract for the
bfa-gateway Cloud Run service and is written to
openapi-specs/bfa-gateway.json during test runs.

tags.name: BFA Gateway
tags.description: Single-ingress tool invocation gateway (ADR-0104 Option C)

post.description:
Routes the request to the appropriate remote domain adapter
identified by `toolName`. The gateway enforces Edge PEP
(authentication), AuthZ PDP (authorization), and Response PEP
(PII masking) around the HTTP call to the adapter service.

502.description: Remote adapter returned an error or is unreachable

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (Edge PEP)

400.description: Invalid request or adapter parameter validation failed

404.description: No adapter registered for the given toolName

get.description: Returns all CES tool names and their adapter routing.

toolName.description: Tool identifier (maps to a registered DomainAdapter)

additionalProperties.description: Free-form parameters forwarded to the adapter

parameters.description: Free-form parameters forwarded to the adapter

ToolInvokeRequest.description: Request to invoke a domain tool through the BFA Gateway

ErrorResponse.description: Error details for a failed tool invocation

ToolInvokeResponse.description: Response from a domain tool invocation via the BFA Gateway

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token supplied by CES or an upstream orchestrator.
